_setup_instructions: === HOW TO CREATE THE DISCORD BOT ===
2. Click 'New Application' -> name it 'Hive Bot' (or 'Ghost Bot' for anime server)
4. Copy the TOKEN and paste it as 'bot_token' above
5. Copy the APPLICATION ID from the General Information tab -> paste as 'application_id'
6. Under 'Privileged Gateway Intents', enable ALL THREE: Presence, Server Members, Message Content
7. Go to OAuth2 -> URL Generator -> select scopes: bot, applications.commands
8. Select permissions: Administrator (or at minimum: Manage Channels, Manage Roles, Send Messages, Embed Links, Attach Files, Read Message History, Add Reactions, Manage Messages)
9. Copy the generated URL and open it in browser to invite bot to your server(s)
10. After inviting, get each server's Guild ID: Enable Developer Mode in Discord settings -> right-click server -> Copy ID
11. Paste the Guild IDs into the 'guild_id' fields above
13. Or via systemd: sudo systemctl start hive-discord
